info.name: LMS — 15 Services (API Gateway)
info.description:
Complete LMS API collection — **15 services** (Eureka + Gateway + 13 microservices).

**Base URL:** `{{baseUrl}}` → `http://localhost:8080`

**Quick start**
1. Run folder **0. Infrastructure** — all 15 health checks
2. Run **1. Auth → 03 Login (admin)** — sets `accessToken`
3. Use folders **1–13** (port order 8081→8095)

| # | Service | Port | Gateway |
|---|---------|------|--------|
| 0 | Eureka | 8761 | — |
| — | API Gateway | 8080 | `/api/**` |
| 1 | auth-service | 8081 | `/api/auth/**` |
| 2 | user-service | 8082 | `/api/users/**` |
| 3 | catalog-service | 8083 | `/api/catalog/**` |
| 4 | mentor-service | 8084 | `/api/mentors/**` |
| 5 | content-service | 8085 | `/api/content/**` |
| 6 | enrollment-service | 8086 | `/api/enrollments/**` |
| 7 | learning-service | 8087 | `/api/learning/**` |
| 8 | certificate-service | 8090 | `/api/certificates/**` |
| 9 | review-service | 8091 | `/api/reviews/**` |
| 10 | notification-service | 8092 | `/api/notifications/**` |
| 11 | analytics-service | 8093 | `/api/analytics/**` |
| 12 | admin-service | 8094 | `/api/admin/**` |
| 13 | media-service | 8095 | `/api/media/**` |

**Seed:** admin@cloudnexus.com / Password123! (id=1) · arjan@cloudnexus.com (id=2) · alex.chen@example.com (id=3)
**Postgres:** localhost:15432 · `lms_admin` / `lms_secret`

item.name: 0. Infrastructure — 15 Services Health
item.description: Eureka (8761), API Gateway (8080), and all 13 microservices. Run this folder to verify the full stack is UP.

item.name: 1. Auth Service (12) — via Gateway
item.description: Port **8081**. All requests via API Gateway (`{{baseUrl}}`).

item.name: 2. User Service (14) — via Gateway

item.name: 6. Enrollment Service (10) — via Gateway

item.name: 7. Learning Service (12) — via Gateway
item.description: Port **8087**. Notes, bookmarks, sessions, Q&A. Run **03 Save Session** → **04 Update Session**; **06 Create Note** → **07/08**.

item.name: 8. Certificate Service (6) — via Gateway
item.description: Port **8090**. All requests via API Gateway (`{{baseUrl}}`).

item.description: Port **8091**. All requests via API Gateway (`{{baseUrl}}`).

item.name: 10. Notification Service (8) — via Gateway
item.description: Port **8092**. All requests via API Gateway (`{{baseUrl}}`).

exec: // Run Admin Send first to create a disposable notification, or use 02 to set notificationId

body.raw:
{
  "userIds": [{{studentUserId}}],
  "type": "system",
  "title": "Scheduled maintenance",
  "message": "Platform maintenance Sunday 2 AM UTC.",
  "link": "/student/notifications",
  "actionLabel": "View details",
  "priority": "normal"
}

{
  "broadcast": true,
  "type": "alert",
  "title": "Platform announcement",
  "message": "New courses added this week.",
  "link": "/student/catalog",
  "actionLabel": "Browse courses",
  "priority": "high"
}
